task_completion.description: Agent logged into the OpenMaint application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the OpenMaint dashboard or interface successfully loaded in a web browser.

task_completion.description: Agent uploaded the correct evacuation plan to the Headquarters building record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint interface showing the 'Headquarters' building record with 'HQ_Evac_Route.pdf' listed in its attachments or documents section.

task_completion.description: Agent uploaded the correct evacuation plan to the Logistics Warehouse building record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint interface showing the 'Logistics Warehouse' building record with 'Warehouse_ZoneB_Draft.pdf' listed in its attachments or documents section.

task_completion.description: Agent set the correct attachment description for the Logistics Warehouse file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attachment details or document list for 'Warehouse_ZoneB_Draft.pdf' under the 'Logistics Warehouse' record explicitly shows the description 'Final Evacuation Plan 2026'.

task_completion.description: Agent verified the North Annex status and did not upload any files to it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'North Annex' building record with a 'Sold' status and an empty attachments/documents section, OR no screenshots showing any file upload actions directed at the 'North Annex' building.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenMaint web GUI to upload files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the OpenMaint web interface to upload files, rather than using terminal commands like curl to interact with the API.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the real OpenMaint application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local URL for OpenMaint, and the interface is fully rendered, not a mocked-up text file or static HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show SQL commands (e.g., psql) being used to directly insert attachment records into the OpenMaint database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target buildings in OpenMaint: 'Headquarters' (Active), 'Logistics Warehouse' (Active), and 'North Annex' (Sold). Expected uploads: 'HQ_Evac_Route.pdf' to Headquarters; 'Warehouse_ZoneB_Draft.pdf' to Logistics Warehouse. The Logistics Warehouse upload must have the exact description 'Final Evacuation Plan 2026'. Because 'North Annex' has a 'Sold' status, no files should be uploaded to its record.
